title: Old School Hardcore
description: Adds back the functionality of deleting the world after you die in hardcore singleplayer
body:
## Old School Hardcore
This mod adds back the functionality of deleting the world when you die in hardcore singleplayer.

It doesn't change the functionality of running hardcore on a server.


This mod is compatible with [HQM](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hardcore-questing-mode) and only marks the world for deletion after you loose your last life.

#### Bugs/Ideas/Requests?
Post bugs/ideas/requests on my Github issue tracker.

#### Modpacks?
You are free to use this mod in modpacks.
